text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the Satsuki Sho, the world shifts its gaze
from the "top two" to the battle between the
three powerful members of "BNW"!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Namely—Biwa Hayahide, Narita Taishin, and
Winning Ticket.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket challenges Narita Taishin to a
scrimmage to prepare for the race of her
dreams—the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Racing against a rival who is striving so
single-mindedly toward her dream should have a
good effect on Narita Taishin... But does it really?
